title: STAC OSI Extension
description: Links STAC Collections and Items to an OSI (Open Semantic Interchange / Apache Ossie) semantic model and surfaces a searchable summary of its metrics.

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Collections.
This is the schema for STAC Items.

osi:version.description: Version of the OSI specification the linked semantic model and the osi:metrics summary conform to. Does not cover the experimental osi:spatial descriptor, which prototypes OSI Discussion 114 and is not part of any finalized OSI release.

osi:semantic_model_href.description: Optional pointer to the OSI semantic model document when it is not attached as an asset.

osi:metrics.description: Denormalized summary of the metrics defined in the linked semantic model, surfaced for discovery and search.

name.description: Metric identifier as defined in the OSI semantic model.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the metric measures.

table:columns.description: Column definitions from the STAC Table extension, optionally annotated with the experimental osi:spatial descriptor.

osi:spatial.$comment: Experimental. A prototype of the OSI spatial dimension descriptor proposed in OSI Discussion 114 (https://github.com/open-semantic-interchange/OSI/discussions/114). OSI has no spatial primitives yet, so this field runs ahead of the upstream standard and may change or be replaced once OSI adopts its own descriptor.
osi:spatial.description: Spatial descriptor for a column. Presence of this field is itself the spatial signal, no separate role field is needed.

geometry_type.description: Geometry kind, following OGC and ISO usage where geometry is planar and geography is spherical.

srid.description: EPSG spatial reference identifier, for example 4326.

spatial_index.description: Discrete global grid index carried by the column, when applicable.
